flavorText: Light clerics channel radiant fire to banish darkness and scorch foes.

features.description: When a creature within 30 feet attacks someone other than you, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll. You can use this a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier per long rest.

As Channel Divinity, dispel magical darkness and force hostile creatures within 30 feet to make a Constitution save, taking radiant damage equal to 2d10 + your cleric level on a failure (half on success).
Your Warding Flare can now be used when a creature attacks you as well as your allies.
Add your Wisdom modifier to damage dealt by your cleric cantrips.
You emit bright sunlight in a 60-foot aura. Enemies in the aura have disadvantage on saving throws against fire and radiant spells you cast.

light-warding-flare.summary: Flash protective light into an attacker's eyes to impose disadvantage on one incoming attack.
light-warding-flare.description: When a creature within 30 feet makes an attack roll, you use your reaction to blind it momentarily with a burst of radiance. The attacker makes the roll at disadvantage. You have a number of uses equal to your Charisma modifier per long rest. At level 6, Improved Flare extends this to protect allies from attacks targeting them, not just yourself.
light-warding-flare.usage: Charisma modifier uses per Long Rest
light-warding-flare.recovery: Regain all uses on a Long Rest.

light-radiance-of-the-dawn.summary: Burst with sunlight-force to dispel magical darkness and punish clustered enemies with radiant damage.
light-radiance-of-the-dawn.description: Radiance of the Dawn dispels all magical darkness within 30 feet and forces hostile creatures in range to make a Constitution saving throw. On a failure they take 2d10 + your cleric level in radiant damage (half on success). Strong against undead, shadow-based enemies, and tightly packed formations. Use it early when the enemy cluster is densest.

light-improved-flare.summary: Your Warding Flare now protects allies as well as yourself — react to any attack within 30 feet.
light-improved-flare.description: Improved Flare removes the restriction that Warding Flare could only be used against attacks targeting you. Now any creature within 30 feet that is attacked becomes a valid target for your reaction flash. This makes the Light cleric a reactive bodyguard as well as an attacker.

light-potent-spellcasting.summary: Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage of all cleric cantrips, keeping radiant pressure online between major spell slots.
light-potent-spellcasting.description: Potent Spellcasting adds your Wisdom modifier to any damage dealt by your cleric cantrips. With a +4 or +5 Wisdom bonus, Sacred Flame or Word of Radiance go from fragile filler to reliable pressure options. This is the Light domain's answer to the level 8 slot — consistent damage that doesn't cost resources.

light-corona-of-light.summary: You emit 60-foot bright sunlight. Enemies in the aura have disadvantage on saves against your fire and radiant spells.
light-corona-of-light.description: Corona of Light is a persistent aura that creates a 60-foot radius of bright sunlight and causes enemies inside it to make all saving throws against your fire and radiant spells at disadvantage. Combined with your spell list and Radiance of the Dawn, this turns the late-game Light cleric into a severe magical threat — every area denial and burst spell hits harder while the aura persists.
